Where the Interest Runs Deep

Interests & Direction

Cars
Drawn to how machines are engineered — performance, design language, and the culture around them. A lifelong enthusiast who reads the specs before the reviews.

Genuinely curious about how things are built in software, not just cars. Technology is the second engine — one that's easier to prototype and iterate on.

Actively working toward building apps for Apple platforms using Swift — turning the interest in tech into something shipped and usable.
